name: Faux Coral Branch Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 28.5 Inch Height - LIT4161 - Creme - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the captivating charm of the faux coral branch table lamps in creme. These exquisite lamps bring a touch of the ocean into your home with their stunning acrylic structure that mimics the beauty of natural coral. The subtle creme color blends seamlessly with various decor styles, adding elegance to any room. Perfect for adding interest to a living room or bedroom, these lamps offer warm, inviting light while serving as a conversation piece. The sophisticated design makes them a versatile addition to your space, whether placed on a side table, console, or nightstand. Elevate your home ambiance with the allure of coastal-inspired decor.
